memoryArtifacts.headline: Priory (Abbey) of Hautes-Bruyères at Saint-Rémy-l'Honoré, France
Simon de Montfort, 5th Earl of Leicester
Holkham Hall
memoryArtifacts.description: Holkham Hall is one of the principal Palladian houses of England, built for Robert de Beaumont, 1st Earl of Leicester of Holkham. The hall is still the home of the current Earl and is surrounded by an attractive park, with a herd of fallow deer, a lake that was once a tidal creek, several monuments and drives, and its own church. Both hall and park are open to the public.

popularStory.headline: Simon de Montfort
popularStory.description:
Simon de Montfort

Birth: 1175, France
Death: Jun. 25, 1218, France
 
Simon IV De Montfort nicknamed "The Crusader", was the son of Simon III De Montfort and Amice De Beaumont. He married Alix (Alice) …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV於1175年出生在法國時，他的父親Simon IV de Montfort24歲，母親Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester22歲。他於1190年與Alix de Montmorency在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯蒙特福吉利曼利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1218年6月25日在法國豪-加洛圖勞斯享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV于1175年出生在法国时，他的父亲Simon IV de Montfort24岁，母亲Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester22岁。他于1190年与Alix de Montmorency在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯蒙特福吉利曼利结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1218年6月25日在法国豪-加洛圖勞斯享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV was born in 1175, in France, his father, Simon IV de Montfort, was 24 and his mother, Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester, was 22. He married Alix de Montmorency in 1190, in Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 25 June 1218, in Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, France, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV est né en 1175, à France, son père, Simon IV de Montfort, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Alix de Montmorency en 1190, à Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 25 juin 1218, à Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, France, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV 1175 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon IV de Montfort 24 und seine Mutter Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester 22. Er hat 1190 in Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich Alix de Montmorency geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Juni 1218 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV è nato il nel 1175 nel Francia, il suo padre, Simon IV de Montfort, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Alix de Montmorency nel 1190, nel Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 25 giugno 1218, nel Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Francia, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IVが1175年にフランスで生まれた時，父Simon IV de Montfortは24歳，母Amice De Beaumont Of Leicesterは22歳であった。1190年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスモントフォート-ル'アマアウリーでAlix de Montmorencyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1218年6月25日にフランスハウテ-ガーオントウロウゼで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV(이)가 1175년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon IV de Montfort(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1190년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 몽포트-'아모리에서 Alix de Montmorency(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1218년 6월 25일 프랑스 하테-가니 토우루스에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV nasceu em 1175, em França, seu pai, Simon IV de Montfort, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Alix de Montmorency em 1190, em Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de junho de 1218, em Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, França, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV родился в 1175 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Simon IV de Montfort было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Alix de Montmorency в 1190 г. в местности монтфорт-л'амаури, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 25 июня 1218 г. в местности тоулоус, хауте-гаронн, Франция в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV nació en 1175, en Francia, su papá, Simon IV de Montfort, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Alix de Montmorency en 1190, en Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 25 de junio de 1218, en Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Francia, a la edad de 43 años.
